result.stdout:
[Warning] Irregular path detected, to ensure files will be created at a correct output path, please call this cli tool from within the package manager console, or the any directory on the Bannerlord Coop project.
Scaffolderlord v1.0.5-beta+c2507e82d11dec99e9526f5e5970ad2a44dc4f4c

Scaffolding CLI tool for generating files for the BannerlordCoop project

Usage:
  Scaffolderlord [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -v, --version   Show version information

Commands:
  collection                         Generates all commands for syncing a collection (patches, handler, messages)
  e2e                                Generates all e2e tests for a specified type
  e2e-fields                         Generates E2E field tests for the specified type (server side tests)
  e2e-lifetime                       Generates E2E lifetime tests for the specified type (server side tests)
  e2e-props                          Generates E2E property tests for the specified type (server side tests)
  commands                           Generates all commands for setting the specified members of a type
  all                                Generates all classes
  sync                               Generates an AutoSync class
  registry                           Generates a Registry class
  lifetime-messages-created          Generates lifetime created message
  lifetime-messages-destroyed        Generates lifetime destroyed messaged
  lifetime                           Generates all lifetime classes for a type (patches, handler, messages)
  lifetime-handler                   Generates lifetime handler
  lifetime-patches                   Generates lifetime patches
  lifetime-messages-network-create   Generates lifetime network create message
  lifetime-messages-network-destroy  Generates lifetime network destroy message

Commands:

  e2e                                Generates all e2e tests for a specified type

  e2e-lifetime                       Generates E2E lifetime tests for the specified type (server side tests)

  commands                           Generates all commands for setting the specified members of a type
  all                                Generates all classes
  sync                               Generates an AutoSync class
  registry                           Generates a Registry class
  lifetime-messages-created          Generates lifetime created message
  lifetime-messages-destroyed        Generates lifetime destroyed messaged
  lifetime                           Generates all lifetime classes for a type (patches, handler, messages)

Scaffolderlord v1.0.5-beta+c2507e82d11dec99e9526f5e5970ad2a44dc4f4c

all: Generates all classes

Usage:
  Scaffolderlord all <type-fully-qualified-name> [options]

Arguments:
  <type-fully-qualified-name>  Specify the fully qualified name of the type using the format: '<namespace>.<type name>, <assembly name>'. Example: 'TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Siege.BesiegerCamp, TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem'" [required]

Options:
  -m, --members    Specify the name of members to AutoSync (accepts fields and properties)
  -o, --overwrite  When set to true will overwrite any existing files, when false a new file with a suffix is created [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information
